des: Nathaniel Lowe doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Oneil Cruz. Elly De La Cruz scores.
Nathaniel Lowe lines out to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.
Nathaniel Lowe lines into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Dane Myers out at 1st.
Nathaniel Lowe grounds out to first baseman Willson Contreras. Noelvi Marte to 3rd.
